title: moniera serpylloides
intro: Moniera serpylloides, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of herbaceous plant native to the Western Ghats in India. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Moniera serpylloides include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Moniera serpylloides is often used in the form of extracts, capsules, or teas, and is also used topically to treat various skin conditions.
